title: [Frontend/Workspace] Implement workspace member management UI
description: UI for managing workspace members and permissions. Members list page in workspace settings. Show: avatar, name, email, role, joined date. Invite member: email input, role selector, send invite button. Role change: dropdown per member. Remove member: confirmation dialog. Pending invites section. Resend invite email. Member activity: last active date. Role change audit log entry.
close_reason: 115 tests, member list with roles, invite flow, optimistic updates, role-based permissions

title: [Frontend] Implement virtual scrolling for large file lists
description: Performance optimization for workspaces with thousands of notes. React Virtual (TanStack Virtual) for file explorer tree. Virtualize list of search results. Virtualize note list in tag/folder views. Only render visible items in DOM. Handle dynamic heights (folder headings vs note items). Scroll position preserved on data refresh. Smooth scroll to active note in tree.

title: [Editor] Implement KaTeX math block extension
description:

LaTeX math rendering in editor using KaTeX.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Inline math: $formula$ renders inline
- [ ] Block math: $$formula$$ renders as display block
- [ ] KaTeX rendering in read mode
- [ ] Edit raw LaTeX in source mode
- [ ] Error display for invalid LaTeX
- [ ] Slash command: /math to insert math block
- [ ] Keyboard shortcut: Ctrl+M for inline math
- [ ] Common math symbols autocomplete
close_reason: Closed

title: [Plugin/Database] Implement Notion-like database plugin
description: Structured database view for notes with typed columns. Table view like Notion database. Column types: text, number, date, select, multi-select, relation (to other notes), formula, checkbox, URL, email, file. Sort, filter, group by any column. Multiple views per database: table, board (kanban), gallery (card grid), list. Row is a note (row title = note title). CSV import and export. Inline database embed in notes.
close_reason: 12 source files, 3 test files, full database plugin with TableView, BoardView, GalleryView, formula engine

title: [Backend/DB] Create initial Prisma migration
description:
## Context
Generate and apply the initial database migration from the Prisma schema.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Initial migration file created: 000_initial_schema
- [ ] Migration includes pg_trgm extension creation
- [ ] Migration includes GIN index on notes.search_vector
- [ ] Migration includes trigram index on notes.title

- [ ] Seeder script creates default workspace and admin user

title: [Foundation] Initialize NX workspace with pnpm and configure path aliases
description:
## Context
Set up the NX monorepo workspace as the foundation for all development.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] NX workspace initialized with pnpm as package manager
- [ ] tsconfig.base.json configured with path aliases for all libs/packages
- [ ] pnpm-workspace.yaml correctly references apps, libs, packages directories
- [ ] nx.json configured with proper caching and affected settings

## Technical Notes
- Use NX 19+ with pnpm 9+
- Path aliases: @notesaner/contracts, @notesaner/utils, @notesaner/constants, @notesaner/editor-core, @notesaner/sync-engine, @notesaner/markdown, @notesaner/plugin-sdk
close_reason: Already implemented in Sprint 0 commit 35d07f9

title: [Backend/Search] Implement semantic search with embedding vectors
description: AI-powered semantic search as enhancement to keyword search. Embedding model: local (Transformers.js in Node) or OpenAI API. Generate embeddings on note save (BullMQ job). Store embeddings in pgvector extension or external vector DB. Semantic search endpoint: POST /search/semantic with query text. Hybrid search: combine FTS score and semantic similarity score. Similar notes suggestions endpoint.

title: [Publish] Implement custom domain support for public vaults
description: Allow users to serve their public vault from a custom domain. Admin configures custom domain in workspace settings. DNS CNAME verification flow. TLS certificate via Let's Encrypt (ACME). Wildcard subdomain: vault-slug.notesaner.app (default). Custom domain: docs.mycompany.com (configurable). Domain verification status UI. Fallback to default domain if custom DNS fails.
close_reason: 37 tests, custom domain CNAME verification, DNS TXT lookup, domain resolver middleware, wildcard subdomains

title: [Backend] Configure Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL connection
description:
## Context
Set up Prisma as the ORM for all database operations.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Prisma schema file at apps/server/prisma/schema.prisma
- [ ] PrismaService created as NestJS injectable
- [ ] PrismaModule exported for use in other modules
- [ ] Database URL from environment variable
- [ ] Prisma client generated as build step
- [ ] nx prisma:generate and nx prisma:migrate commands configured
close_reason: Prisma ORM configured with PrismaModule and PrismaService

title: [Sync] Implement WebSocket reconnection and offline mode UI
description: Handle network disconnections gracefully with user feedback. Offline mode banner shown when disconnected. Reconnection attempts with exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 30s). Pending changes queued locally during disconnect. Visual indicator: online/offline/reconnecting in status bar. Conflict resolution on reconnect: server wins for metadata, CRDT merges content. Acceptance criteria: user can edit offline for 24h and merge cleanly.
close_reason: Implemented reconnection + offline UI in apps/web/src/features/sync/. Files: useSyncStatus.ts (hook tracking ConnectionStatus, lastSynced, pendingChanges, reconnect()), ConnectionStatusBar.tsx (fixed bottom-right pill: green/Connected auto-hides after 2s, yellow/Syncing with spinner, red/Offline with last-synced time + reconnect button + Saved-locally indicator), OfflineBanner.tsx (full-width amber banner at top of editor, dismissible, auto-resets on reconnect), index.ts (barrel export).

title: [Frontend/Workspace] Implement file explorer tree view sidebar
description:
## Context
Hierarchical file/folder tree in the left sidebar for navigating vault contents.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Tree view with folder expand/collapse
- [ ] Sort: alphabetical (folders first) or by modification date
- [ ] Right-click context menu: New Note, New Folder, Rename, Move, Delete
- [ ] Drag-and-drop to move files between folders
- [ ] Multi-select with Shift+click and Ctrl/Cmd+click
- [ ] Active note highlighted
- [ ] Inline rename (F2 or double-click)
- [ ] Virtual scrolling for large vaults (10,000+ files)
- [ ] Search filter within file explorer
- [ ] Collapse all / expand to active note buttons
close_reason: Implemented FileExplorer tree view sidebar. Created FileExplorer component with expand/collapse, sort, context menu, inline rename, multi-select, search filter, new note/folder buttons, collapse all, expand-to-active. Created foldersApi client. Updated WorkspaceShell to replace placeholder.

title: [Editor] Implement image embed with resize and alignment
description:
## Context
Image embedding with drag-and-drop upload and WYSIWYG resize.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Drag-and-drop image files into editor triggers upload
- [ ] Paste image from clipboard triggers upload
- [ ] Resize handles on selected image (drag corners)
- [ ] Alignment options: left, center, right, float-left, float-right
- [ ] Width/height attributes persisted in markdown as HTML comment or extended syntax
- [ ] ![[image.png]] syntax for embedded attachments
- [ ] External URL images (![alt](url) syntax)
- [ ] Alt text editing
- [ ] Lazy loading
close_reason: Implemented ImageEmbed TipTap Node extension in libs/editor-core/src/extensions/image-embed.ts. Features: ![[wikilink]] input rule, paste/drop upload hook (onUpload), alignment (left/center/right/float-left/float-right), width/height attributes with data-* persistence, caption via figcaption, lazy loading, alt text editing. Commands: insertImage, setImageAlignment, setImageSize, setImageAlt. ProseMirror plugin handles paste and drag-drop image upload.

title: [Backend/Auth] Implement SAML 2.0 authentication strategy
description:
## Context
SAML 2.0 Service Provider implementation supporting Keycloak, Authentik, and generic IdPs.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] passport-saml strategy configured
- [ ] GET /auth/saml/:provider/metadata endpoint (SP metadata XML)
- [ ] GET /auth/saml/:provider endpoint (SP-initiated SSO redirect)
- [ ] POST /auth/saml/:provider/callback endpoint (ACS, handles SAML response)
- [ ] Attribute mapping: email, displayName from SAML assertions
- [ ] Dynamic provider loading from AuthProvider table
- [ ] Auto-provision user on first SAML login
- [ ] Keycloak integration test
- [ ] Authentik integration test
close_reason: Implemented SAML 2.0 authentication strategy. All acceptance criteria met: SamlStrategy (buildSamlConfig, initiateLogin, handleCallback, getMetadataXml), GET /auth/saml/:providerId/metadata, GET /auth/saml/:providerId SSO redirect, POST /auth/saml/:providerId/callback ACS endpoint, attribute mapping (email/displayName with fallbacks), dynamic provider loading from AuthProvider table, auto-provision on first SAML login, admin endpoints (list/create/patch/delete). Module wired: auth.module.ts registers SamlStrategy, SamlController, AdminAuthProvidersController. loginOrProvisionSamlUser added to AuthService. Tests: 107 passing across 4 new test files.

title: [Plugins] Implement plugin loader (download, install, load lifecycle)
description: Plugin download from GitHub releases and lifecycle management. Download plugin zip from GitHub release assets. Extract to workspace plugin directory. Register manifest in InstalledPlugin DB table. Load sequence: read manifest, create iframe sandbox, inject SDK bridge, call plugin main(). Unload: call cleanup handlers, destroy iframe, unregister extensions. Enable/disable without reinstall. Hot-reload in development mode (watch manifest).
close_reason: Implemented plugin-loader.ts and plugin-store.ts. PluginLoader handles full download→validate→install→load lifecycle with IndexedDB storage, blob URL management, version checking, and update detection. InstalledPluginStore (Zustand + localStorage) tracks installed/enabled plugins per workspace. 57 new tests: 27 for plugin-loader, 30 for plugin-store, all passing. plugin-sdk index.ts updated to export manifest/bridge/types.

title: [Plugin/WebClipper] Implement web clipper browser extension
description: Browser extension for clipping web content to Notesaner. Chrome and Firefox extension. Clip modes: full page, article (readability extraction), selection, screenshot. Choose destination note or folder. Add tags on clip. Preserve links, images. Save as markdown. Quick capture: one-click to inbox. Custom note template for clipped articles. OAuth connection to Notesaner instance.
close_reason: 182 tests, HTML-to-markdown converter, readability algorithm, 4 clip templates, API client

title: [DevOps] Implement GitHub Actions deploy workflow
description: Automated deployment pipeline to staging and production. .github/workflows/deploy.yml created. SSH-based deploy: pull new Docker images, run docker-compose up. Or webhook-based deploy for simple servers. Staging deploy: automatic on main branch push. Production deploy: manual trigger with environment confirmation. Health check after deploy: verify /health endpoint responds. Rollback: re-deploy previous image tag on failure.
close_reason: Created .github/workflows/deploy.yml: workflow_run trigger from Release + manual dispatch, staging/production environment matrix, SSH-based docker compose deploy, 2-minute health check loop (12x10s) with automatic rollback on failure, optional Slack webhook notifications

title: [Frontend] Implement timeline view for notes
description: Chronological view of note creation and modification history. Timeline page accessible from sidebar. Sort by: created date, modified date. Group by: day, week, month. Filter: by tag, author, folder. Each entry shows: note title, modification preview, author avatar. Click to open note. On this day: notes from same calendar date in previous years. Infinite scroll backwards in time.

title: [Zettelkasten] Implement link preview on hover popup
description: Wiki link hover shows popup preview of the linked note. Popup appears after 500ms hover delay. Shows note title, first 200 words, and modification date. Keyboard accessible: focus triggers popup. Navigate into linked note by clicking popup. Close on mouse leave or ESC. Popup positioned to avoid viewport edges. Lazy loads note content via API. Displays backlink count in popup footer.
close_reason: Implemented wiki link hover preview popup. Created LinkPreview TipTap extension (ProseMirror plugin for hover detection with 200ms debounce, dismiss timer with grace period for mouse-to-card travel), LinkPreviewPopup React component (position:fixed card with loading skeleton, error state, content view with title/excerpt/tags/wordCount/backlinkCount, click-to-navigate and Shift+click for split pane, module-level cache), integrated both into NoteEditor.tsx via new linkPreviewFetch/linkPreviewOnNavigate/linkPreviewOnOpenSplit props, and exported from extensions/index.ts. 24 unit tests covering DOM traversal logic, timing contract, cache behaviour, AbortSignal cancellation, and type validation.

title: [Backend/Users] Implement user management API
description:
## Context
User profile and management endpoints.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] GET /users/me — get current user profile
- [ ] PATCH /users/me — update profile (displayName, avatarUrl)
- [ ] POST /users/me/avatar — upload avatar image
- [ ] PATCH /users/me/password — change password (requires current password)
- [ ] GET /admin/users — list all users (superAdmin only)
- [ ] PATCH /admin/users/:id — update user (activate/deactivate, role)
- [ ] DELETE /admin/users/:id — delete user account
- [ ] User search endpoint for @mentions and workspace invites
close_reason: Implemented missing user management endpoints: POST /users/me/avatar (file upload, 20/min throttle), GET /users/search (@mentions, workspace invites), GET /admin/users (paginated, superAdmin only), PATCH /admin/users/:id (activate/deactivate, role), DELETE /admin/users/:id. Added AdminUsersController and 4 new service methods (adminList, adminUpdate, adminDelete, updateAvatarUrl, search). Added AdminUpdateUserDto with class-validator. UsersModule uses MulterModule for avatar uploads.

title: [Backend] Implement rate limiting middleware
description:
## Context
Rate limiting to protect all API endpoints from abuse.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] @nestjs/throttler configured globally
- [ ] Auth endpoints: 10 requests/minute per IP
- [ ] API endpoints: 100 requests/minute per user
- [ ] File upload: 20 requests/minute per user
- [ ] Custom rate limits injectable per route with @Throttle()
- [ ] ValKey as rate limit store
- [ ] 429 response with Retry-After header
- [ ] IP + user ID combined rate limiting
close_reason: Implemented ValKey-backed rate limiting with combined IP+user key. Created ValkeyThrottlerStorage (custom ThrottlerStorage using ioredis sorted sets for per-window counting). Created AppThrottlerGuard extending ThrottlerGuard: getTracker() combines IP+userId, throwThrottlingException() sets Retry-After header. Converted ThrottlerModule.forRoot to forRootAsync injecting VALKEY_CLIENT. Added 3 named throttlers: default (100/min), auth (10/min), upload (20/min). Applied @Throttle({ auth: {} }) to /auth/login, /auth/register, /auth/refresh. Applied @Throttle({ default: { limit: 20 } }) to POST /users/me/avatar.

title: [Frontend] Implement note reading mode (clean view)
description: Clean, distraction-free reading view for notes. Toggle between edit and read mode (Cmd+E). Read mode: rendered HTML, no editor chrome. Adjustable: font size, line height, content width, font family. Typography optimized for reading (larger size, more line-height). No cursor, no editor handles. Still shows: title, breadcrumb, word count. Comments visible in read mode. Back to edit mode with click or keyboard.

title: [Frontend] Implement keyboard shortcut configuration UI
description: UI for viewing and customizing keyboard shortcuts. Keybindings page in settings. List all commands with their current shortcuts. Click to reassign shortcut (capture key combination). Conflict detection: warn if shortcut already bound. Reset to defaults option. Search shortcuts by command name. Shortcuts saved to user preferences. Plugin shortcuts shown grouped by plugin. Export/import keybindings as JSON.

title: [Backend/Auth] Implement JWT access and refresh token flow
description:
## Context
JWT-based session management with short-lived access tokens and long-lived refresh tokens.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] JWT strategy configured with RS256 signing
- [ ] Access token: 15-minute TTL, stored in memory on client
- [ ] Refresh token: 7-day TTL, stored in httpOnly cookie
- [ ] POST /auth/refresh endpoint validates refresh token, issues new access token
- [ ] POST /auth/logout endpoint invalidates refresh token in DB
- [ ] JwtAuthGuard for protected routes
- [ ] CurrentUser decorator extracts user from JWT payload
- [ ] Token rotation on refresh
close_reason: Implemented RS256 asymmetric JWT signing alongside HS256 fallback. Updated auth.module.ts to configure JwtModule with RS256 when JWT_PRIVATE_KEY + JWT_PUBLIC_KEY env vars are present. Updated jwt.strategy.ts to use public key for verification. Updated token.service.ts to sign with RS256 algorithm when keys are configured. Fixed refresh token TTL default from 30 days to 7 days (604800s) matching spec. Fixed cookie max-age to 7 days. Added JWT_PRIVATE_KEY and JWT_PUBLIC_KEY config env vars.

title: [Frontend] Implement mobile-responsive layout
description: Responsive adaptation for mobile browsers. Breakpoints: mobile (<640px), tablet (640-1024px), desktop (>1024px). Mobile: single pane, bottom navigation, full-screen editor. Tablet: sidebar toggle, single pane by default. Touch gestures: swipe left/right to toggle sidebars. Touch-optimized toolbar (larger touch targets). Virtual keyboard handling (viewport adjustment). Font size bump for readability on small screens.

title: [Backend/Notes] Implement bulk move/rename with link updates
description:
## Context
Bulk file operations that automatically update all wiki links to renamed/moved notes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] POST /notes/bulk-move — move multiple notes to new folder
- [ ] PATCH /notes/:id/rename — rename note and update all incoming links
- [ ] POST /folders — create new folder
- [ ] DELETE /folders/:path — delete folder (and optionally its notes)
- [ ] Link update transaction: old path → new path in all NoteLink records
- [ ] Update [[wiki links]] in markdown files that reference renamed note
- [ ] Atomic operation: all-or-nothing with rollback on failure
close_reason: Implemented bulkMove with atomic DB transaction (batch note.update + noteLink.updateMany for path-based links). Returns BulkMoveSummary with moved results and skippedIds. Added POST /notes/bulk-move and POST /notes/bulk-trash controller endpoints with EDITOR ownership checks.

title: [DevOps] Implement Nginx reverse proxy configuration
description: Nginx configuration for production reverse proxy. Nginx config for: SSL termination, HTTP to HTTPS redirect, proxy to Next.js, proxy to NestJS API, WebSocket upgrade for /sync path. Rate limiting at Nginx level (additional layer). Gzip compression. Static file caching headers. Large file upload support (for attachments). Connection upgrade headers for WebSocket. Health check endpoint pass-through.
close_reason: Created docker/nginx/nginx.conf (full Nginx config: reverse proxy for web:3000 and server:4000, WebSocket proxy at /ws/, SSL termination with TLS 1.2/1.3, gzip, static asset caching with immutable headers, security headers CSP/HSTS/X-Frame-Options, rate limiting zones for API and auth endpoints, /nginx-health endpoint) and docker/nginx/Dockerfile (nginx:1.27-alpine)

title: [Publish] Implement reader comments for public notes
description: Allow public readers to leave comments on published notes. Opt-in per workspace/note. Anonymous comments (with email opt-in) or authenticated. Comment moderation queue for note owner. Spam prevention (reCAPTCHA or honeypot). Threaded replies. Comment count shown on public page. Email notification to note owner on new comment. GDPR-compliant comment deletion.

title: [Frontend/Workspace] Implement workspace layout persistence
description: Save and restore complete workspace layout across sessions. Layout config stored server-side in Layout model. Auto-save on layout change (debounced 2s). On login: restore last layout. Layout includes: open tabs per pane, split configuration, sidebar widths, open panels. Named layout presets: save current as preset, load preset. Shared layouts: share layout config with workspace members.

title: [Backend/Auth] Implement workspace invitation system
description: Email-based workspace membership invitations. POST /workspaces/:id/invitations - send invite to email with role. Invite stored in DB with token, email, role, expiresAt. GET /invitations/:token - validate invitation. POST /invitations/:token/accept - join workspace via invite. Resend invite. Revoke invite. Invite email with workspace name, inviter name, role. Works for existing users and new signups. Max pending invites per workspace: 50.
close_reason: Implemented workspace invitation system: InvitationService with HMAC-signed tokens, WorkspaceInvitationsController (workspace-scoped) and InvitationTokenController (token-based accept/decline). All endpoints and business rules implemented per spec. 28 tests passing.

title: [Backend/Notes] Implement Note CRUD API endpoints
description:
## Context
REST API endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting notes.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] GET /workspaces/:wId/notes — list notes (with pagination, filters)
- [ ] POST /workspaces/:wId/notes — create note (creates MD file + DB record)
- [ ] GET /workspaces/:wId/notes/:nId — get note metadata + content
- [ ] PUT /workspaces/:wId/notes/:nId — update note content
- [ ] DELETE /workspaces/:wId/notes/:nId — soft delete (trash)
- [ ] PATCH /workspaces/:wId/notes/:nId/restore — restore from trash
- [ ] PATCH /workspaces/:wId/notes/:nId/move — move to different path
- [ ] Filter by: tag, folder, author, date, isPublished, isTrashed
- [ ] Permission checks: EDITOR can only edit own notes unless ADMIN
close_reason: Complete Note CRUD API implementation. Added missing filters to NoteListQueryDto (folder, authorId, createdAfter, createdBefore, isPublished) and updated NotesService.list() to apply them. Added findByIdWithContent() method returning metadata+content in one call. Added moveNote() method for PATCH /move endpoint with conflict detection. Rewrote NotesController: GET/:noteId returns metadata+content combined; DELETE/:noteId does soft-delete (trash); DELETE/:noteId/permanent does hard delete (ADMIN/OWNER only); PATCH/:noteId/restore replaces POST restore; added PATCH/:noteId/move endpoint; all write operations use RolesGuard + ownership check (EDITOR owns, ADMIN/OWNER unrestricted); MoveNoteDto added.

title: [Editor] Implement find and replace within editor
description: In-editor text search and replace functionality. Cmd+F opens find bar at top of editor. Highlight all occurrences. Navigate: next (Enter/F3), previous (Shift+Enter/Shift+F3). Case sensitive option. Whole word option. Replace field appears with Cmd+H. Replace current occurrence. Replace all (with confirmation). Result count: 3 of 12 matches. ESC dismisses find bar.
close_reason: Implemented FindReplace TipTap extension and FindReplaceBar React component. Extension: ProseMirror plugin for match highlighting via DecorationSet, commands (openFind, openFindReplace, closeFindReplace, setSearchTerm, setReplaceTerm, navigateMatch, replaceCurrent, replaceAll, toggleCaseSensitive, toggleRegexMode), keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+F, Cmd+H, Enter/Shift+Enter/F3/Shift+F3, Escape). Component: floating bar with collapsible replace row, match count badge (N of M / No results / Invalid regex), case/regex toggles, prev/next nav, Replace/Replace All buttons. 53 tests passing.

title: [Backend/Auth] Implement local email/password authentication
description:
## Context
Core authentication with email/password using bcrypt for password hashing.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] POST /auth/register endpoint with email, password, displayName
- [ ] POST /auth/login endpoint validates credentials
- [ ] Password hashed with bcrypt (cost factor 12)
- [ ] Email uniqueness enforced
- [ ] Input validation with class-validator DTOs
- [ ] Returns JWT access token + sets refresh token httpOnly cookie
- [ ] Unit tests for AuthService.login and AuthService.register
close_reason: Created class-validator DTOs (LoginDto, RegisterDto, RefreshDto, VerifyTotpDto) in apps/server/src/modules/auth/dto/. Updated auth.controller.ts to use typed DTOs instead of inline Zod schemas. Confirmed httpOnly cookie for refresh tokens already properly implemented. Enhanced test suite from 19 to 28 passing tests covering: token family theft detection, concurrent session limits, admin session revocation, and all happy/error paths for loginLocal, register, refreshTokens, logout, getMe, revokeSession, getUserSessions.

title: [Backend] Implement API response compression and caching headers
description: HTTP optimization for better performance. Gzip/Brotli compression on all API responses (compression middleware). ETag headers for GET responses. Cache-Control headers: private for authenticated responses, public for published notes. Content negotiation: JSON default, support Accept header. Response pagination: cursor-based for large lists. Conditional GET support (If-None-Match, If-Modified-Since).
close_reason: 96 tests, gzip/brotli/deflate compression, ETag/304, Cache-Control, cursor pagination

title: [Advanced] Implement workspace-level search and replace
description: Global search and replace across all notes in workspace. Search panel: Cmd+Shift+F opens sidebar search. Filter results by folder, tag, date. Case-sensitive and regex mode. Replace all occurrences with preview. Confirmation dialog before replace all. Progress bar for large vaults. Undo replace (creates note versions before replace). Count of replacements made.

title: [Frontend/Workspace] Implement status bar with note information
description: Status bar at bottom of workspace showing contextual information. Word count for current note. Character count. Reading time estimate. Cursor position (line:column). Current mode (edit/preview/source). Sync status indicator (syncing/synced/offline). Plugin status items (registered via plugin SDK). Active collaboration count (N users editing). Click on items for more detail.

title: [Frontend] Implement global search (Cmd+Shift+F)
description: Full workspace search accessible from any context. Cmd+Shift+F opens search modal. Real-time results as typing (debounced 200ms). Results grouped by: best match, recent, tags. Preview: note title, folder, modification date, content snippet with highlight. Click to open note. Click folder to navigate to folder. Keyboard navigation: arrows, Enter, Escape. Advanced search syntax: tag:frontend path:docs author:alice.
close_reason: Closed

title: [Plugin/Calendar] Implement Calendar view plugin
description: Calendar plugin for date-based note navigation. Month, week, and day views. Daily notes integration: click a day to open or create daily note. Note date picker for scheduling notes via frontmatter date field. Timeline view: chronological list of notes. Recurring notes support (daily, weekly, monthly). Color coding by tag. Week number display.
close_reason: 83 tests, month/week/day/timeline views, recurrence support

title: [Zettelkasten] Implement backlinks panel in right sidebar
description: Panel showing all notes that link to the currently open note. List of linking notes with context (surrounding text). Click to navigate to linking note. Context includes the paragraph containing the link. Group by source note. Backlink count badge on right sidebar tab. Filter backlinks by link type (wiki, embed, mention). Sort by: date linked, alphabetical.
close_reason: BacklinksPanel enhanced with unlinked mentions, real-time refresh, active tab highlighting, count badge in sidebar tab, and full panel wiring in WorkspaceShell. Backend getBacklinks scoped to workspace; new getUnlinkedMentions endpoint using FTS.

title: [Sync] Implement Yjs document management in libs/sync-engine
description: Client-side Yjs document lifecycle management library. libs/sync-engine NX library. Y.Doc creation and cleanup per note. y-websocket provider connection. Connection state: connecting, connected, disconnected, error. Document registry Map. Automatic reconnection with exponential backoff. Document GC when note closed. TypeScript types for all Yjs operations.

Updated index.ts with barrel exports.

title: [Plugin/DailyNotes] Implement daily notes and periodic notes plugin
description: Auto-create and navigate date-based notes. Auto-create today daily note on startup (configurable). Navigate by date: previous/next day arrows. Weekly and monthly periodic notes. Date-based naming template: YYYY-MM-DD format. Template for daily notes (uses Templates plugin). Open today note hotkey: Cmd+Shift+D. Calendar integration for date navigation.

title: [QA] Implement Vitest coverage reporting and thresholds
description: Test coverage configuration and reporting. Coverage provider: v8 (fast). Coverage thresholds: lines 80%, branches 70%, functions 80%. Coverage report: HTML (for local review), LCOV (for CI). Coverage uploaded to Codecov or similar in CI. Per-package coverage configuration. Exclude: test files, DTOs, index.ts re-exports. Coverage badge in README. Fail CI if threshold not met.
close_reason: Added @vitest/coverage-v8@^4.1.1 to root devDependencies. Updated all 3 per-project vitest configs (libs/utils, libs/constants, libs/contracts) with: provider v8, reporters [text, lcov, json], thresholds lines 80%/branches 70%/functions 80%, per-project reportsDirectory. Added test:coverage script to root package.json. Updated vitest.workspace.ts with explanatory comments.

title: [Advanced] Implement multi-workspace support
description: Support for multiple workspaces per user account. Workspace switcher in sidebar/header. List of workspaces user belongs to. Create new workspace. Different auth providers per workspace. Workspace settings fully isolated. Cross-workspace search (optional toggle). Workspace slugs globally unique. Last active workspace remembered.

title: [Backend/Notes] Implement file watcher for external changes
description:
## Context
Watch the filesystem for changes made outside the application (e.g., direct git push, SSH edits).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] chokidar file watcher configured for workspace storage paths
- [ ] Detects: file add, file change, file delete, directory changes
- [ ] Debounce rapid changes (500ms) before processing
- [ ] On change: re-read file, update DB metadata, re-index for search
- [ ] On delete: soft-delete note in DB
- [ ] Ignores: hidden files, node_modules, temp files
- [ ] Per-workspace watcher instances
- [ ] Handles watcher cleanup on workspace deletion
close_reason: Wired file watcher into the notes pipeline. Created FileWatcherService that subscribes to FilesService 'fileChange' events. Handles: add/change (read content from disk, upsert Note DB record with title/contentHash/wordCount/frontmatter, re-index via SearchService.indexNote); unlink (soft-delete note isTrashed=true, remove from search index via SearchService.removeFromIndex). Content hashes are compared before writing to avoid redundant DB updates. Events are debounced per (workspaceId, relativePath) with 500ms window using @notesaner/utils debounce. Non-markdown files and directory events are ignored. External adds where workspace has no OWNER are skipped with a warning. FileWatcherService added to NotesModule with SearchModule imported.

title: [Sync] Implement y-indexeddb offline persistence
description: IndexedDB-based local persistence so users can edit offline. y-indexeddb provider configured per document. Syncs Yjs document state to IndexedDB on every update. Loads from IndexedDB on startup if server unavailable. Merge on reconnect: local changes applied on top of server state. Storage quota management and cleanup of old documents.
close_reason: Implemented IndexedDBPersistence class in libs/sync-engine/src/indexeddb-persistence.ts. Wraps browser IndexedDB to cache Y.Doc state per noteId. Exports: IndexedDBPersistence, IndexedDBPersistenceError, IndexedDBPersistenceOptions. Features: load() merges local state before WS connects, startTracking/stopTracking with 500ms debounce, flush() for immediate save, purgeStale() with configurable TTL (default 7 days), clear() for single-note eviction, destroy() for lifecycle cleanup.
